---
title: "Getting Back on Track"
date: '2026-03-02'
categories:
  - planning
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Plan of the Day

- Catch up with weekly planning and task management since I've been sick for the last two weeks.

### Projects Touched Today

- None

### Progress Notes


### Products & Word Count

<div>

> **Today's total: 0 words**
>
> **Monthly total to date: 0 words**
>
> **Annual total to date: 20,747 words**

</div>

### Tomorrow's Plan
